title: Fractions, decimals and percentages
instruction: Answer these English and maths questions.

questions.question: A sign says 'SALE — 1/3 OFF all shoes'. What does this mean?
options: You save one third of the price
Only one third of shoes are on sale
questions.answer: You save one third of the price

questions.question: How do you say this fraction correctly: 3/4?
A label says '0.75 litres'. What is this as a fraction of 1 litre?
A TV costs £480. It is reduced by 25%. What is the sale price?
You pay £36 for an item in a 1/4 off sale. What was the original price?
A loan has 10% interest per year. You borrow £500. How much interest do you pay after 1 year?
